caption: Saturday rehearsal at Chris's place — working through new arrangements for the fall season. So much good stuff in the works. #acousticguitar #fingerstyle #chesapeakeacoustic
Gerald's parlor guitar has a tone that stops every rehearsal cold. Her grandmother played this same instrument. 🎸 #fingerstyle #acousticguitar #heirloom
Live at the Waverly Community Center last Saturday. Thank you to everyone who came out — the room felt electric. More shows this fall! #livemusic #baltimore #chesapeakeacoustic
Dana's fiddle arrangement on 'Blackwater' is something else. Clip from rehearsal — full version at the May show. #fiddle #acoustic #americana
Marcus's bass keeps everything grounded while Gerald and Dana trade melodic lines. Trio magic. Photo by Gerald after the show. #bassguitar #acousticensemble
CAC at the Silver Spring Arts Night — thank you to the whole crew who packed that room on a Tuesday evening. We felt every one of you. #silverspringmd #liveacoustic
New song demo — Gerald on melody, Chris on the low end harmonics. Still rough but it's shaping up. #acousticoriginal #songwriting
Backstage at the Dragonfly Music Center show. Forty students in the room and zero nerves from Gerald — she's a natural teacher-performer. #dragonflymusiccenter #baltimore
Valentine's eve at the community center. Setlist included a Tommy Emmanuel cover that absolutely destroyed the room. 🎵 #valentinesconcert #fingerstyle
Recording session at Chris's house. Gerald tracking the guitar parts for the winter EP. The parlor guitar mic'd up close sounds incredible. #recording #acousticguitar
New Year show at the Mount Vernon Cultural Center. Sold out! Thank you Baltimore for a beautiful evening to start 2026. #newyearsshow #baltimorelivemusic
Winter rehearsal — the trio working through a new Iron & Wine-inspired arrangement. Dana's vocal harmonies are the secret ingredient. #ironandwine #acousticcover
Christmas Eve community gathering — Gerald opened with a solo piece on the parlor guitar. Every year this one hits different. #christmaseve #acousticguitar #community
Derek's place gathering — music + great food, our favorite kind of show. His specialty grocery is a perfect acoustic venue. Thanks Derek! #baltimore #acousticshow #neighborhoodmusic
Dragonfly Music Center fingerstyle workshop — 22 students and every single one left with something new. Proud of this group. #guitarworkshop #dragonflymusiccenter #fingerstyle
Fall season kick-off at the Charles Village block party. Gerald and Chris playing duo — the crowd just gathered around them organically. ❤️ #charlesvillage #baltimore #streetmusic
Summer open mic at the Peabody Bookshop. Intimate, 30 seats, packed. These are our favorite kinds of shows. #openmic #baltimore #acousticguitar
CAC EP available now! Download link in bio — pay what you want. All proceeds go to instrument access programs in Baltimore schools. #chesapeakeacousticEP #indieacoustic
First show of the summer season at the Druid Hill Park amphitheater. Zero PA, pure acoustic, 80 people on the grass. Nothing better. #druidhillpark #baltimore #acousticshow
Announcing CAC at the Brookhaven Arts Festival, Washington DC — November 7, 2026! Tickets in bio. This one's going to be special. 🎶 #brookhavenartsdc #chesapeakeacoustic #upcoming
Practice clip — Gerald running through a new original piece. Open D tuning, totally hypnotic. 🎵 #fingerstyle #opentuning #acousticguitar
Post-show table at the community center. Gerald signing tablature packets — yes she made them herself, yes they're available in her store. Link in bio. #guitartabs #fingerstyle
